scripts.test:critical: pnpm --filter @flux/backend test -- src/application/critical-regression-suite.spec.ts && pnpm --filter @flux/web test -- src/application/critical-regression-suite.spec.ts && cd apps/ios && swift test --filter CriticalRegressionFlowTests
scripts.test:happy-paths: pnpm --filter @flux/backend test -- src/application/happy-path-e2e-suite.spec.ts && pnpm --filter @flux/web test -- src/application/happy-path-e2e-suite.spec.ts && cd apps/ios && swift test --filter HappyPathFlowTests
scripts.test:edge-cases: pnpm --filter @flux/backend test -- src/application/edge-case-e2e-suite.spec.ts && pnpm --filter @flux/web test -- src/application/edge-case-e2e-suite.spec.ts && cd apps/ios && swift test --filter EdgeCaseFlowTests
scripts.test:recovery-paths: pnpm --filter @flux/backend test -- src/application/recovery-path-e2e-suite.spec.ts && pnpm --filter @flux/web test -- src/application/recovery-path-e2e-suite.spec.ts && cd apps/ios && swift test --filter RecoveryPathFlowTests
scripts.release:check: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm test:critical && cd apps/ios && swift test
